    • org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.query.QueryUtils
      Modifier and Type
      Constant Field
      Value
      public static final String
      COUNT_QUERY_STRING
      "select count(%s) from %s x"
      public static final String
      DELETE_ALL_QUERY_BY_ID_STRING
      "delete from %s x where x.%s in :ids"
      public static final String
      DELETE_ALL_QUERY_STRING
      "delete from %s x"
